`amount` tokens against deposited collateral.         Reverts if resulting health factor would be < 1."},"borrowRatePerYear()":{"notice":"Current annual borrow rate (scaled by 1e18)."},"deposit(uint256)":{"notice":"Deposit `amount` tokens as collateral."},"healthFactor(address)":{"notice":"Returns health factor of a position (scaled by 1e18).         A value < 1e18 means the position can be liquidated."},"liquidate(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Liquidate an undercollateralised position.         Liquidator repays `debtAmount` and receives collateral + 5 % bonus."},"pendingInterest(address)":{"notice":"Returns pending interest (not yet accrued) for a user."},"repay(uint256)":{"notice":"Repay `amount` of outstanding debt."},"utilisation()":{"notice":"Returns current utilisation ratio (scaled by 1e18)."},"withdraw(uint256)":{"notice":"Withdraw collateral. Reverts if health factor would drop below 1."}},"notice":"Simplified overcollateralised lending protocol.  Rules:  \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500  \u2022 Users deposit ERC-20 token as collateral.  \u2022 Max borrow = 75 % of collateral value (LTV = 75 %).  \u2022 Health factor = (collateral * liquidationThreshold) / debt.  \u2022 Health factor < 1 \u2192 position can be liquidated.  \u2022 Simple linear interest rate: BASE_RATE + SLOPE * utilisation.  \u2022 Interest is tracked per-second via accrueInterest().  Note: For simplicity we use a single token as both collateral and        borrowed asset (could be extended to two-token lending).","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/LendingPool.sol":"LendingPool"},"evmVersion":"osaka","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"]},"sources":{"src/ERC20Token.sol":{"keccak256":"0x3f547471480ae0b0ba87fb0c060dc10b052deb1f18c251a20ae18bba8bfffb60","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://c51c50f070afc65cc80d5179d9a4d40c418ff90f355801ea71523b516047f2df","dweb:/ipfs/QmZnTM4Z5WtzCrC9U2pcUa3V7BCdyoK2LVi5wQ9w7GXmNm"]},"src/LendingPool.sol":{"keccak256":"0xf567ac8790cfcadff7293ed5c22255eccdf890b63beb8df5b7511c34a7447077","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://d70437f836725c5c5c822dfb7d66f64bfed33cdc4fe0a952ff74cf92ff6999f4","dweb:/ipfs/QmTxZKMEZMoT37FMf7zEcFkXyiCuztd6Ls43ZoWRKgLgAL"]}},"version":1}

borrow(uint256).notice: Borrow `amount` tokens against deposited collateral.         Reverts if resulting health factor would be < 1.

healthFactor(address).notice: Returns health factor of a position (scaled by 1e18).         A value < 1e18 means the position can be liquidated.

liquidate(address,uint256).notice: Liquidate an undercollateralised position.         Liquidator repays `debtAmount` and receives collateral + 5 % bonus.

pendingInterest(address).notice: Returns pending interest (not yet accrued) for a user.

withdraw(uint256).notice: Withdraw collateral. Reverts if health factor would drop below 1.
